# teams config get

Show configuration values

## Usage

```
teams config get [key] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `key` | Config key to read. Omit to show all values. | No |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--json` | [OPTIONAL] Output as JSON |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
